Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x8009 "APPLECIDERSPIDER-8009" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Apple Cider Spider (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Removed the calls to the kernal load routine ($FFD5) at $C147 and the kernal save routine ($FFD8) at $C13B to remove disk access from the game (for high score loading and saving). Also reset the highscore table at $7A89 (80 bytes) and restored the original copyright message at $C3C9. The D64 image used for this is the modified Desperado (ASS) release from GameBase64. It is hoped this can be replaced with a dump of the original disk in the future.
